name: 福州
description: Fuzhou, capital of Fujian Province, is a historic city with 2200 years of history. Known for its traditional榕树 (banyan) trees, Fuzhou-style architecture, and as gateway to Taiwan. Features cultural sites like 三坊七巷 (Three Lanes and Seven Alleys) and Buddhist圣地 (sacred) Mount Putuo.
highlights: Three Lanes and Seven Alleys - Historic districts
Fuzhou National Forest Park - Urban nature
Drum Mountain - Scenic area with temples

climate.tips: Best in spring and autumn. Summers hot and humid with typhoons. Winter mild but rainy. Hot springs popular year-round.

attractions.name: 三坊七巷
attractions.description: Historic district with traditional Ming/Qing architecture, cultural museums, and local crafts.
attractions.tips: Best evening with lighting. Try local snacks. Less crowded early morning.

attractions.name: 鼓山
attractions.description: Scenic mountain with ancient temples, hiking trails, and panoramic city views.
attractions.tips: Take cable car up. Visit Hannya Temple. Great for sunrise.

attractions.name: 福州国家森林公园
attractions.description: Large urban forest park with banyan trees, hiking trails, and bird watching.
attractions.tips: Morning visits best for birds. The big banyan is iconic.

attractions.name: 福州西湖
attractions.description: Historic urban lake with gardens, pavilions, and traditional Chinese landscaping.
attractions.tips: Best morning for tai chi. Beautiful lotus in summer.

attractions.name: 林则徐纪念馆
attractions.description: Memorial to Lin Zexu, the famous Qing Dynasty official who fought opium trade.
attractions.tips: Combine with Three Lanes visit. Important historical figure.

attractions.name: 福州白塔
attractions.description: Ancient five-story pagoda dating to Tang Dynasty, offering city views.
attractions.tips: Combine with nearby Yongquan Temple. Best at sunset.

attractions.name: 于山风景区
attractions.description: Historic mountain in city center with ancient pavilions, temples, and banyan trees.
attractions.tips: Morning visits popular with locals. Great for quick hike.

attractions.name: 福州温泉
attractions.description: Fuzhou is famous for hot springs, a local tradition for relaxation and health.
attractions.tips: Must-try experience. Evening visits popular. Try spring water eggs.

attractions.name: 马尾船政文化景区
attractions.description: Historic shipyard and naval base from Qing Dynasty, China's modern shipbuilding birthplace.
attractions.tips: Day trip. Important for Chinese naval history.

attractions.name: 福州烟台山
attractions.description: Historic hill with colonial architecture, churches, and panoramic views.
attractions.tips: Less known attraction. Best in morning. Great for photos.

attractions.name: 福州熊猫世界
attractions.description: Panda research center with giant pandas and educational exhibits.
attractions.tips: Great for families. Morning visits best for active pandas.

attractions.name: 福州博物馆
attractions.description: Regional museum with collections showcasing Fuzhou's history and Min culture.
attractions.tips: Good for rainy days. Combine with nearby cultural center.

attractions.name: 上下杭
attractions.description: Historic commercial district with traditional shops, temples, and riverside views.
attractions.tips: Best evening. Traditional atmosphere preserved.

attractions.name: 福州西湖公园
attractions.description: Beautiful park around the lake with gardens, amusement rides, and food stalls.
attractions.tips: Popular with families. Evening dragon dance performances.

attractions.name: 琅岐岛
attractions.description: River island with beaches, seafood, and laid-back island atmosphere.
attractions.tips: Day trip. Fresh seafood. Less touristy.

attractions.name: 福州动物园
attractions.description: Large zoo with diverse animals and conservation programs.
attractions.tips: Great for families. Morning visits best.

attractions.name: 左海公园
attractions.description: Large park with lake, gardens, and theme areas for families.
attractions.tips: Combine with West Lake. Great for families.

attractions.name: 福州大学城
attractions.description: Area with several universities, youthful atmosphere, and affordable dining.
attractions.tips: Great for budget travelers. Cafes and cheap eats.

attractions.name: 乌塔
attractions.description: Tang Dynasty stone pagoda, one of Fuzhou's oldest structures.
attractions.tips: Combine with White Pagoda visit.

attractions.name: 闽江夜游
attractions.description: Night boat cruise on Min River with illuminated city skyline.
attractions.tips: Best night activity. Arrive early for good seats.

attractions.name: 福州海底世界
attractions.description: Aquarium with marine life, seal shows, and underwater tunnel.
attractions.tips: Great for families. Check show schedule.

attractions.name: 永泰云顶
attractions.description: Mountain scenic area with grass slopes, flower fields, and cloud sea views.
attractions.tips: Day trip. Best in fine weather. Bring jacket.

attractions.name: 福州烈士陵园
attractions.description: Memorial to revolutionary martyrs with panoramic city views.
attractions.tips: Morning visits solemn. Great city views from top.

attractions.name: 福州开元寺
attractions.description: One of Fuzhou's oldest Buddhist temples, dating to Tang Dynasty.
attractions.tips: One of Fuzhou's oldest temples. Peaceful atmosphere.

attractions.name: 福州茉莉花茶园
attractions.description: Tea plantation and processing facility for famous Fuzhou jasmine tea.
attractions.tips: Must-visit for tea lovers. Jasmine tea is famous.

restaurants.name: 聚春园
restaurants.description: One-diamond Black Pearl restaurant specializing in authentic Fujian cuisine with imperial heritage.

restaurants.name: 福州鱼丸
restaurants.description: Iconic Fuzhou snack - tender fish balls in rich fish broth.

restaurants.name: 肉燕
restaurants.description: Famous Fuzhou snack - meat dumplings with translucent wrapper.

restaurants.name: 佛跳墙
restaurants.description: Legendary Fujian dish - rich stew with seafood, chicken, and herbs.

restaurants.name: 福州海鲜
restaurants.description: Fresh seafood restaurant near fishing port with daily catches.

restaurants.name: 福州捞化
restaurants.description: Local breakfast - thin rice noodles in savory broth with various toppings.

restaurants.name: 福州炖罐
restaurants.description: Traditional Fuzhou steamed soup pots with various ingredients.

restaurants.name: 沙茶面
restaurants.description: Popular noodle dish with satay sauce, a Fuzhou breakfast staple.

restaurants.name: 蚵仔煎
restaurants.description: Famous Fujian street food - crispy omelette with fresh oysters.

restaurants.name: 鼎泰丰
restaurants.description: World-famous dumpling chain with excellent xiaolongbao.

restaurants.name: 海底捞
restaurants.description: Famous hotpot chain with exceptional service.

restaurants.name: 永和鱼丸
restaurants.description: Famous chain for fish balls with authentic Fuzhou taste.

restaurants.name: 老福州
restaurants.description: Restaurant serving traditional Fuzhou dishes in historic setting.

restaurants.name: 达道牛肉
restaurants.description: Famous for beef dishes, especially beef offal soup.

restaurants.name: 韩式料理
restaurants.description: Korean restaurant near universities with authentic food.

restaurants.name: 红糖馒头
restaurants.description: Popular breakfast snack - fluffy steamed buns with brown sugar.

restaurants.name: 福州粥
restaurants.description: Congee shop serving various savory and sweet congees.

restaurants.name: 锅边糊
restaurants.description: Famous Fuzhou night snack - rice batter around pot edge.

restaurants.name: 春伦茉莉花茶
restaurants.description: Famous tea house serving authentic Fuzhou jasmine tea.

restaurants.name: 广东酒家
restaurants.description: Cantonese restaurant with dim sum and seafood.

arrival.tips: Airport 50km from city center. Airport bus (25 CNY) or taxi (180 CNY). Metro Line 1 connects.

arrival.to: Fuzhou Railway Station / Fuzhou South Station
arrival.tips: Fuzhou South for high-speed. Fuzhou Station for regular. Both have metro.

bike: Three Lanes area perfect for cycling

hotels.name: 福州香格里拉大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best location. Book river view rooms.

hotels.name: 福州温泉五四路亚朵酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Good for hot spring tourists. Popular Chinese brand.

hotels.name: 如家酒店福州三坊七巷店
7天连锁酒店福州五一广场店
福州悦华酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Good for sightseeing. Book during off-peak.

hotels.name: 福州西湖大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Great lake views. Book lake view rooms.

hotels.name: 福州温泉大饭店
hotels.bookingTips: Perfect for hot spring experience. Book spa packages.

hotels.name: 福州大学城花园酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Great for budget travelers and families.

hotels.name: 福州鼓山度假酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Perfect for hikers. Book during off-peak.

hotels.name: 福州闽江世纪金源大酒店
福州茉莉花温泉度假酒店

culturalTips.title: Fujian Cuisine
culturalTips.content: Fujian cuisine is one of China's Eight Great Cuisines, known for seafood, soups, and delicate flavors. Signature dishes include Buddha Jumps Over Wall, oyster omelette, and fish balls.

culturalTips.title: Jasmine Tea Culture
culturalTips.content: Fuzhou is famous for jasmine tea, made by scenting green tea with fresh jasmine flowers. Tea houses are central to local culture, and visiting one is a must-do experience.

culturalTips.title: Min Culture
culturalTips.content: Fuzhou has unique Min culture distinct from other Chinese regions. The local dialect (Min Chinese), architecture, and customs differ significantly from Mandarin-speaking areas.

culturalTips.title: Hot Spring Tradition
culturalTips.content: Fuzhou has famous hot spring culture dating back to Tang Dynasty. Locals believe hot springs have healing properties. Visiting a hot spring resort is a local tradition.

culturalTips.title: Fuzhou Dialect
culturalTips.content: Fuzhou dialect is part of Min Chinese family, completely unintelligible with Mandarin. Locals appreciate visitors trying a few phrases in local dialect.

culturalTips.title: Colonial Heritage
culturalTips.content: Fuzhou had foreign concessions in the 19th-20th century, leaving colonial architecture especially around Yantai Mountain area.

culturalTips.title: Best Time
culturalTips.content: Spring (March-May) and autumn (October-November) are best. Summer hot and humid with typhoons. Winter mild but rainy. Hot springs pleasant year-round.

culturalTips.title: Must-Try Snacks
culturalTips.content: Fuzhou snacks are famous: fish balls (鱼丸), meat dumplings (肉燕), oyster omelette (蚵仔煎), rice noodles (捞化), and pot edge paste (锅边糊).

culturalTips.title: Maritime History
culturalTips.content: Fuzhou was a major port in ancient China and is the departure point for voyages to Taiwan. The Mawei Shipyard is where China's modern naval industry began.

culturalTips.title: Banyan Trees
culturalTips.content: Fuzhou is famous for its ancient banyan trees, which are protected and considered city symbols. The largest banyan in Fuzhou National Forest Park is over 1,000 years old.

culturalTips.title: Fujian Opera
culturalTips.content: Fujian opera is a traditional performing art with over 400 years of history. Performances feature unique singing styles and elaborate costumes.

culturalTips.title: Tea Ceremony
culturalTips.content: Fuzhou people take tea ceremony seriously. Visit a traditional tea house to experience the proper way to brew and serve jasmine tea.

culturalTips.title: Mountain and River
culturalTips.content: Fuzhou is surrounded by mountains on three sides with the Min River flowing through. This geography creates pleasant summer temperatures compared to other southern cities.

culturalTips.title: Relaxed Lifestyle
culturalTips.content: Fuzhou has a relaxed pace of life. Locals enjoy morning tea, evening walks by the river, and weekend visits to hot springs.

culturalTips.title: Three Lanes and Seven Alleys
culturalTips.content: The Three Lanes and Seven Alleys (三坊七巷) is a preserved historic district with traditional闽南 (Min) architecture. It dates to the Tang Dynasty.

emergencyContacts.name: 福建医科大学附属第一医院

quickFacts.water: Tap water safe after boiling; bottled water recommended
